body.docName: 消费平台开通结果回调
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/travel/account/bind-callback 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/travel/account/bind-callback 
 ## 接口描述 
企业绑定消费平台账号信息后，费控发送消费平台开通申请事件，供应商处理完该事件后需回调本接口用于告知是否开通成功。 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"platform","required":true,"label":"%E6%B6%88%E8%B4%B9%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0","exampleValue":"PLATFORM_CODE"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"bindSuccess","required":true,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E5%BC%80%E9%80%9A%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"failReason","label":"%E7%BB%91%E5%AE%9A%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0","desc":"%20%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E8%AF%A5%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C","exampleValue":"true"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%22%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%22"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"errorMsg","desc":"%20%E5%BC%82%E5%B8%B8%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%EF%BC%8C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA","label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求报文
```json
{
    "platform":"PLATFORM_CODE",
    "bindSuccess":true
}
```
### 响应报文
```json
{
  "success":true,
  "message":"成功",
  "returnCode":"SUC0000"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|
  | --- | --- | 
  | 200| 成功|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/travel/account/bind-callback

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/travel/account/bind-callback

接口描述

企业绑定消费平台账号信息后，费控发送消费平台开通申请事件，供应商处理完该事件后需回调本接口用于告知是否开通成功。

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"platform","required":true,"label":"%E6%B6%88%E8%B4%B9%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0","exampleValue":"PLATFORM_CODE"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"bindSuccess","required":true,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E5%BC%80%E9%80%9A%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"failReason","label":"%E7%BB%91%E5%AE%9A%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0","desc":"%20%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E8%AF%A5%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA"}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C","exampleValue":"true"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%22%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%22"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"errorMsg","desc":"%20%E5%BC%82%E5%B8%B8%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%EF%BC%8C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA","label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF"}}]}]}

接口调用示例

请求报文

{
    "platform":"PLATFORM_CODE",
    "bindSuccess":true
}

响应报文

{
  "success":true,
  "message":"成功",
  "returnCode":"SUC0000"
}

错误码说明

错误码 错误信息
200 成功
